GOLFBALL SIZE HAIL DESTROYED WINTER AND SPRING WHEAT FIELDS, SOME FIELDS WERE 100 PERCENT LOST, OTHERS WERE 50 PERCENT LOST. ANOTHER FARMER 23 MILES NORTH OF CIRCLE REPORTED 1.75 INCH HAIL THAT COMPLETELY COVERED THE GROUND AND ACCUMULATED A FEW INCHES IN DEPTH. THEY ALSO REPORTED 1.5 TO 2 INCHES OF RAIN IN THE MINOR VARIOUS RAIN GAGES NEAR THE FARMS THAT CAUSED SOME FLOODING ACROSS GRAVEL ROADS AND ACROSS LOW LYING FIELDS.

HAIL LASTED ABOUT 5 MINUTES UNTIL 530 PM. MOSTLY DIME SIZE AND SMALLER HAIL, BUT THERE WERE SOME LARGER PIECES. ALSO, ESTIMATED 1 TO 2 INCHES OF RAIN IN ABOUT 20 MINUTES TIME FRAME. HE WILL CALL BACK WITH A RAINFALL TOTAL.
SPOTTER WAS NEARLY BLOWN OFF OF A FOUR WHEELER. WINDS STARTED AROUND 534 PM AND LASTED ABOUT 10 MINUTES.

SOME SIGNIFICANT CROP LOSS, SOME FIELDS 100 PERCENT, OTHER 50 PERCENT OF CROP LOSS. VERY HEAVY RAINFALL WITH BURRO PITS FULL AND ROADS ARE ALMOST IMPASSABLE WITH THE GUMBO CLAY. HAIL LASTED ABOUT 5 MINUTES AT LEAST.
